name: Big Valentine Heart
subject: holidays/valentine
prompt: one large plump heart filling the page, smooth simple curves and a clean rounded point at the bottom, with a small loopy bow tied at the top, perfect for little hands to color

name: Candy Conversation Hearts
subject: holidays/valentine
prompt: a cheerful pile of small candy conversation hearts scattered together, each rounded heart printed with a short sweet message like Be Mine, Love You, and XOXO, varying sizes overlapping gently

name: Cute Valentine Teddy Bear
subject: holidays/valentine
prompt: a fluffy sitting teddy bear with round ears and a big happy smile, hugging a large heart against its tummy with both paws, a little bow on its head, soft cozy fur

name: Cupid with Bow and Arrow
subject: holidays/valentine
prompt: a chubby cherub cupid floating in the air with small feathered wings, drawing back a bow with a heart-tipped arrow, a flowing sash and a sweet focused expression, a few tiny hearts drifting nearby

name: Valentine Love Letter
subject: holidays/valentine
prompt: an open envelope with a folded letter sliding out, a heart-shaped wax seal on the flap, the words I Love You written across the page in pretty script, two small hearts decorating the corners

name: Rose Bouquet for Valentine
subject: holidays/valentine
prompt: a bouquet of blooming roses with layered petals, leafy stems gathered together and tied with a ribbon bow, a few small hearts tucked among the flowers, wrapped neatly at the base

name: Valentine Heart Mandala
subject: holidays/valentine
prompt: a symmetrical circular mandala built entirely from repeating hearts, petals, dots, and lace patterns radiating out from a central heart, intricate and detailed with even spacing all around

name: Love Bug Valentine
subject: holidays/valentine
prompt: a smiling cartoon ladybug love bug with heart-shaped spots on its rounded wings, little curled antennae topped with tiny hearts, big friendly eyes, sitting on a small leaf

name: Hugging Heart Couple
subject: holidays/valentine
prompt: two cartoon hearts with little arms, legs, and cheerful faces hugging each other side by side, rosy cheeks and closed happy eyes, a few small floating hearts above them

name: Valentine Cupcake
subject: holidays/valentine
prompt: a sweet cupcake in a ruffled paper liner topped with swirled frosting, a single heart-shaped cherry on top, tiny sprinkles dotting the frosting, sitting on a little plate

name: Key to My Heart
subject: holidays/valentine
prompt: an ornate heart-shaped padlock hanging beside a decorative old-fashioned key with a heart-shaped handle, a thin ribbon linking them together, small swirls and details on both

name: Be Mine Banner
subject: holidays/valentine
prompt: a wavy ribbon banner stretched across the page with the words Be Mine in cheerful bubble letters, strings of small hearts hanging below the banner, a few bigger hearts in the corners
